headline: Is It Too Late To Consider ConocoPhillips (COP) After 41.5% One-Year Gain?
summary: Wondering if ConocoPhillips at about US$125 per share still offers value, or if most of the opportunity has already played out. The stock has had mixed recent moves, with a 2.5% decline over the last 7 days, a 7.0% return over 30 days, and returns of 29.5% year to date and 41.5% over 1 year. These may signal shifting expectations for risk and opportunity. Recent coverage has focused on ConocoPhillips as a large US oil and gas producer, with attention on how its size and asset base position...
